title: TrustForge Proof Event
description: Signed record of an important event (TF-0005). Hash-chain verification lives in Phase 2.

event_version.description: Version of the proof-event schema itself.

type.description: Dotted event-type identifier, e.g. session.established, action.approved.

instance_id.description: Specific actor instance that produced the event.

session_id.description: Session identifier this event belongs to.

level.description: Proof level at which this event was emitted.

subject_ref.description: Reference to the object this event is about (capability ID, file hash, etc.).

payload_hash.description: Hash of the event's associated payload.

parent_hash.description: Hash of the immediately preceding event in the hash-chain.

context.description: Free-form context object carried with the event.

provenance.description: Chain of responsibility for this event: who/what authorised, requested, and executed the action. TF-0006 "chain of responsibility".

agent.description: AI agent that issued the request.

instance.description: Specific running instance of the agent.

model.description: Model identifier (provider-prefixed) the agent invoked, e.g. anthropic:claude-opus-4-7.

tool.description: Tool / function name (e.g. MCP tool) the agent called.

requested_action.description: Action the agent originally asked to perform.

signature.description: Signature envelope over the canonical form of this event (not verified in the foundation phase).
